ksa_text: Ability to monitor emerging regulatory requirements and assess the impact of regulatory changes on organizational compliance posture and strategic priorities.

dcwf.top_element_label: Define and/or implement policies and procedures to enable an AI risk assessment process and assess risk mitigation efforts.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Define and/or implement policies and procedures to enable an AI risk assessment process and assess risk mitigation efforts.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-A-005 (Risk & Compliance/Ability) scores 0.559 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.559). Scope is in_scope for Clinical AI Specialist: 1 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, Risk & Compliance, composite 0.559. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Risk & Compliance for Clinical AI Specialist?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk & Compliance appears in approximately 75% of Clinical AI Specialist job postings. FDA 510(k)/HIPAA/CE marking regulatory knowledge required for most clinical AI roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Risk & Compliance is market-validated for Clinical AI Specialist. Final decision: include.

decision_rationale: KSA RC-A-005 (Risk & Compliance/Ability) scores 0.559 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.559). Scope is in_scope for Clinical AI Specialist: 1 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.
